title: url.resolve
description: Resolve an incoming app link (route + search params) against the open library and report per-entity existence. Used by the future 'open shared link' affordance and by importers that need to know whether to clear selection or render an empty state.

link.description: The full in-app URL to resolve. May be the hash form (e.g. 'index.html#/inventory?id=item-123&frame=light') or just the route+search fragment ('/inventory?id=item-123&frame=light').

libraryId.description: The library identifier the caller expects the link to belong to. The server compares this to the currently-open library and returns library.mismatch when they differ.

route.description: Canonical route id matched (e.g. '/inventory', '/plans/$planId'). Equal to the path with `$param` placeholders preserved.

params.description: Parsed path params, narrowed against the matched route contract.

search.description: Parsed search params after validateSearch, with unknown and invalid keys dropped.

entities.description: Per-entity resolution result for every ResolvableEntityRef declared by the matched route.

status.description: 'exists' if the entity is present; 'missing' if not found in the current library; 'redirected' if a canonical replacement is available.

redirectTo.description: For 'redirected' status: the canonical id to use instead.

onMissing.description: Echoed from the route contract so the caller can apply the right UX.

overallStatus.description: 'ok' when every entity exists; 'partial' when at least one path entity exists but at least one search id is missing; 'stale' when no referenced entity exists. Taxonomy is settled (C-020-2).

suggestedNavigation.description: Optional navigation hint the caller may apply directly.

search.description: Search params to apply, with stale ids omitted.

replace.description: Whether to replace the current history entry rather than push.

errorCodes.message: The supplied link does not match any registered route.
A required path entity referenced by the link does not exist in the current library. Returned only when the missing entity is on a path segment whose route cannot render without it.
The supplied link could not be parsed into a route and search shape.
This link is from a different library.
